impact: This advances the PP&D plan by proving the autonomous platform tranche keeps whole-site archival, Playwright draft automation, PDF draft filling, and formal-logic outputs tied to shared source evidence IDs without live crawling or authenticated automation.
summary: Adds deterministic tranche 2 evidence-continuation coverage with a committed fixture and syntax-valid Python test.
target_task: Task checkbox-225: Add autonomous platform continuation coverage for tranche 2 proving whole-site archival, Playwright draft automation, PDF field filling, and formal-logic outputs stay connected through source evidence IDs.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
